SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-03-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-03-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED ONLY. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHIN, PETER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LIM, KAM-SHU $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $91.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,591.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
